YOUR CART

How do I create an OpenSea account?

Opensea You'll require computerized cash, a crypto wallet, and an OpenSea record to begin trading NFTs utilizing OpenSea. How about we get everything rolling!

1. Buy computerized money (ETH)
You can purchase ETH, the computerized cash that powers exchanges on the Ethereum blockchain, from a computerised money trade like Coinbase. You'll require ETH to "mint" a NFT, buy a NFT, and for gas charges to finish exchanges. Gas charges are somewhat of a precarious idea, yet we work on the essentials in our What are gas expenses? help guide.

Since you have ETH, we should get a crypto wallet.

2. Introduce a crypto wallet
A crypto wallet, for example, MetaMask, stores your ETH and processes exchanges on the Ethereum blockchain. A one of a kind wallet address will be produced for you, and you'll utilize this location to finish exchanges.
All exchanges associated with your wallet address can be found on etherscan.io, a free blockchain adventurer. It's really smart to actually take a look at Etherscan subsequent to finishing every exchange.

For what reason do I want a wallet prior to trading on OpenSea?
OpenSea is an instrument you use to communicate with the blockchain. We never claim your things or store your NFTs. All things being equal, we give a framework to distributed trades. Since you'll utilize OpenSea login to collaborate straightforwardly with others on the blockchain, you'll require a wallet to assist you with transforming your activities in the program into exchanges on the blockchain. You can see the accessible wallets in our assist with focusing direct, What crypto wallets might I at any point use with OpenSea?

Since you have a crypto wallet introduced, you can interface your wallet address to OpenSea.

3. Associate with OpenSea
How about we associate your wallet to OpenSea login and alter your profile so you're prepared to start connecting on our foundation. Explore to opensea.io and click the Profile symbol.
